mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_product WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_product WHERE price BETWEEN #{minPrice} AND #{maxPrice} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_product WHERE name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_product ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, description, image, price, stock, sales, enabled, category_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{image}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{enabled}, #{categoryId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, sales = #{sales}, enabled = #{enabled}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
